basic_details.job_title: PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Recruitment 2026: Punjab Agricultural University has released the official notification for 5 Junior Lab / Field Helper posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 58 years

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper Recruitment 2026 - Overview
PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper positions is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Lab / Field Helper position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Junior Lab / Field Helper posts by Punjab Agricultural University in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is Middle with Punjabi language proficiency. Candidates must have passed the Middle standard examination and possess knowledge of Punjabi.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Lab / Field Helper posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for these posts is between 18 years (minimum) and 58 years (maximum). Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Lab / Field Helper role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Junior Lab / Field Helper position will receive a fixed monthly salary of Rs. 14,286/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 100/-. Please ensure you pay the correct fee along with your application.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the PAU Junior Lab / Field Helper positions?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You must download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by a review by the Selection Committee. Candidates are advised to prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The Junior Lab / Field Helper positions are offered on a contract basis by Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab Agricultural University, which is pau.edu. Links are also provided in the "Important Links" section.
